candidate_archival_state.archival_reason: INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE at P10 via K9 (OOS 87 trades/43.6y < 50/y floor); edge generalized positive but OOS sample below floor

central_finding.edge_generalization: CORROBORATED. s19 OOS net +$44,049.52, expectancy +$336.08/trade (vs s18 OOS +$210.43), sharpe +0.238 (vs +0.125), win 59.77%, PF 2.23. DR4 did NOT fire. The weekly RS edge direction held on genuinely independent data -- evidence it is a real, portable premium, not an s18 single-universe artifact.
central_finding.framework_validation: K9 did its job: it refused to certify a positive-looking OOS edge that rests on too few realized round-trips. No gate was relaxed; cadence/params were NOT tuned (identical to s18).
central_finding.headline: NUANCED replication outcome: the s18 EDGE GENERALIZED to the independent universe (positive across IS + cost-stress + 5/5 K13 + a positive OOS that was even STRONGER per-trade than s18), but the s19 CANDIDATE is TERMINAL at P10 by INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 -- the independent universe's OOS turnover (43.6/y) fell below the K9 >=50/y floor.
central_finding.sample_shortfall: The s19 candidate cannot be OOS-CONFIRMED because its OOS sample (87 trades, 43.6/y) is below the inviolate K9 floor. A strong but thin-sample OOS edge is statistically unverifiable at the required floor -- exactly the s17 lesson, now recurring at OOS on a different universe.

diagnostic_only_disclosure: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY; NOT live-ready, NOT paper-ready, NOT Strategy-Lab-ready, NOT FRC-granted. Trading PAUSED; Live BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED.
does_s19_confirm_or_reject_s18: PARTIAL / NUANCED. It CORROBORATES the generalization of the s18 weekly RS EDGE (the edge direction and sign held on an independent universe through IS, cost-stress, 5/5 K13, and a positive OOS -- stronger per-trade than s18). It does NOT produce a second OOS_CONFIRMED candidate: the s19 candidate is TERMINAL at P10 by K9 (OOS turnover 43.6/y < 50/y floor). Net: edge-generalization corroborated; the formal s19 replication candidate is K9-terminal at OOS. Neither a clean confirm nor a rejection -- the edge replicates, the candidate does not clear the sample gate.
honest_caveats_load_bearing: DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY and NOT live-ready: 6-gate live-block + FRC-never-granted apply regardless.

The edge generalizing (positive, stronger per-trade) while the SAMPLE falls short is itself informative: the weekly RS premium appears real/portable, but OOS turnover on a given universe can dip below the K9 floor -- so the candidate's certifiability is universe/period-contingent even when the edge is present.
The pre-SEAL K9 projection (~90-117) overestimated the actual OOS turnover (87); projections from IS rates are not guarantees -- P10's measured count is the binding test.
Single replication on one independent universe; corroborating but not definitive about the edge's universality.
inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, s19 IS-only) PASSES: aggregate 226; per-fold F1/F2/F3 54/79/71; OOS projected ~90-117/2y.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

REPLICATION OF s18 (NOT a tune/_revN_): mechanic byte-identical to the OOS_CONFIRMED s18 weekly spec (7e6aa36); ONLY the universe changes (24 independent names). s18 frozen/untouched. The edge is NOT inherited.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: s18 OOS edge was thin + recently-weak (F5 negative). The s19 edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s19 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0). A null/negative s19 = s18 was universe-specific (accepted, informative).

STOP-BEFORE-PROMOTION (terminal, NOT a tune): pre-SEAL K9 PASSED; the EDGE is the open gate. If s19 P6 IS edge negative/zero, OR K13 <3/5, OR P10 OOS K9 <50/y -> terminal. A param/cadence change = NOT a replication (a different fresh candidate).
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): RS-rotation native weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18; NOT tuned, NOT searched).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cost_drag <<5% (s18 ~0.95%/y).
split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse s19 DR9-passed CSVs (574fa9e); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061 spin-off applied+verified.
24-name INDEPENDENT universe LOCKED; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 (independent) by sealed result 574fa9e (0c8e21f2); cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 ~8 sectors); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s18/s17/s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal-or-frozen preserved verbatim; s19 is a FRESH replication sibling; clears T-FORBID-16..24; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: replication of locked s18 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

no_live_promotion_authorization_exists: By framework design there is NO phrase that promotes any candidate to live/paper/Strategy-Lab; FRC NEVER_GRANTED; 6-gate block permanent.
rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL projects ~90-117/2y (clears marginally); TRUE OOS K9 confirmed only at P10; if measured OOS <50/y at P10, terminal. The chain shall NOT relax K9.

terminal_driver.name: oos_closed_trades_below_floor
terminal_driver.precedence_note: K9 (OOS >=50/y; >=100 over 2y) is INVIOLATE and precedes DR4 in the chain. s19 OOS produced 87 closed trades (43.6/y) < the floor -> INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE (terminal), EVEN THOUGH the edge was positive (DR4 would not have fired). The independent universe's OOS turnover fell short of the sample floor; the pre-SEAL projection (~90-117) was optimistic vs the actual 87.

title: s19-d1 independent-universe weekly RS rotation P11 lifecycle decision (sealed; binding; TERMINAL by INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE/K9 at P10; replication EDGE generalized but candidate K9-terminal at OOS; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY)
what_this_does_NOT_demonstrate: It does NOT demonstrate live/paper readiness or money-proven performance.
It does NOT REJECT the s18 edge -- the edge clearly generalized (positive everywhere on s19); only the s19 candidate's OOS sample was insufficient.
It does NOT warrant promotion/Strategy Lab/broker/FRC -- all remain blocked.
It does NOT license tuning the s19 cadence/M to manufacture OOS trades (that would be a fresh candidate, not a replication).
